segments.text: Doth not wisdom cry? and understanding put forth her voice?
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: She standeth in the top of high places, by the way in the places of the paths.
She crieth at the gates, at the entry of the city, at the coming in at the doors.
Unto you, O men, I call; and my voice is to the sons of man.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: O ye simple, understand wisdom: and, ye fools, be ye of an understanding heart.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Hear; for I will speak of excellent things; and the opening of my lips shall be right things.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For my mouth shall speak truth; and wickedness is an abomination to my lips.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: All the words of my mouth are in righteousness; there is nothing froward or perverse in them.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: They are all plain to him that understandeth, and right to them that find knowledge.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Receive my instruction, and not silver; and knowledge rather than choice gold.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For wisdom is better than rubies; and all the things that may be desired are not to be compared to it.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I wisdom dwell with prudence, and find out knowledge of witty inventions.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The fear of the LORD is to hate evil: pride, and arrogancy, and the evil way, and the froward mouth, do I hate.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Counsel is mine, and sound wisdom: I am understanding; I have strength.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me kings reign, and princes decree justice.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me princes rule, and nobles, even all the judges of the earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I love them that love me; and those that seek me early shall find me.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Riches and honour are with me; yea, durable riches and righteousness.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: My fruit is better than gold, yea, than fine gold; and my revenue than choice silver.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I lead in the way of righteousness, in the midst of the paths of judgment:
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: That I may cause those that love me to inherit substance; and I will fill their treasures.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The LORD possessed me in the beginning of his way, before his works of old.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning, or ever the earth was.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When there were no depths, I was brought forth; when there were no fountains abounding with water.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Before the mountains were settled, before the hills was I brought forth:
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: While as yet he had not made the earth, nor the fields, nor the highest part of the dust of the world.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

footnotes: the highest part: or, the chief part

segments.text: When he prepared the heavens, I was there: when he set a compass upon the face of the depth:
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When he established the clouds above: when he strengthened the fountains of the deep:
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When he gave to the sea his decree, that the waters should not pass his commandment: when he appointed the foundations of the earth:
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Then I was by him, as one brought up with him: and I was daily his delight, rejoicing always before him;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Rejoicing in the habitable part of his earth; and my delights were with the sons of men.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Now therefore hearken unto me, O ye children: for blessed are they that keep my ways.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Hear instruction, and be wise, and refuse it not.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Blessed is the man that heareth me, watching daily at my gates, waiting at the posts of my doors.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For whoso findeth me findeth life, and shall obtain favour of the LORD.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: But he that sinneth against me wrongeth his own soul: all they that hate me love death.
segments.speaker: Wisdom
